description_long: This house features an L-shaped layout with a combination of brick exterior walls and large industrial-style windows, giving it a modern yet utilitarian appearance. The structure is single-story, with a flat roof and a mix of open-plan and segmented interior spaces visible through the cutaway. The main entryway is marked by a simple door set into the brick facade, with minimal decorative elements and no porch or overhang. Several large windows provide ample natural light to the interior, and there are visible outdoor landscaping elements such as small trees and shrubs near one corner. The interior includes multiple rooms, some with visible furniture and fixtures, suggesting a functional residential layout. The overall design emphasizes practicality and openness, with a focus on spacious communal areas.
description: A modern, single-story L-shaped brick house with large industrial-style windows, flat roof, and minimalistic entryway. The layout features open communal spaces and visible landscaping elements.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main brick facade, the primary entry door, and a row of large windows, with interior rooms and furnishings visible through the cutaway.
description_view_1: This angle shows the side of the house with prominent landscaping, a turquoise-colored communal area, and additional windows along the brick wall.
description_view_2: From this perspective, the rear and side of the house are visible, with more segmented rooms, smaller windows, and a glimpse of interior decor.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the opposite side, showing a secondary entry, more windows, and a clear view of the flat roof and interior divisions.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large industrial-style windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door set in brick facade, no porch or overhang, minimal decorative elements
